decision.summary: Open the April 14 BTC 74k dip market; no existing position needs management and no floor trade is valid.
decision.rationale: The latest Beecthor transcript and recent summaries keep the active thesis bearish after the 76k rejection, still treating the rebound as corrective and favoring another move down with 74.3k-76k as the key upper zone. Binance spot at 74779.43 is below the 24h high of 76038.0 after that rejection, so execution reality does not invalidate the downside idea. Under nearest-strike-first, the closest bearish daily price-hit market below spot is `will-bitcoin-dip-to-74k-on-april-14` at 45.5%, which sits in the preferred range and is not priced too aggressively. Weekly downside markets remain too discounted, and the floor market above 74k is invalid because Beecthor still allows a break back below 74k.

details.market: Will Bitcoin dip to $74,000 on April 14?
